Term Sheet — Proposed Share Subscription and Convertible Debentures for Lanna NextGen Public Company Limited (LNGL)
Issuer: Lanna NextGen Public Company Limited, a Thai public company listed on the Neo Siam Exchange (NSE-TH) under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) of Thailand; listing and disclosure overseen by the fictional Siam Securities Regulator (SSR).
Investors: Silver Lotus Capital (Mauritius) Ltd. and Siam Venture Bridge Co., Ltd. (Thailand).
Instrument: THB 1,200,000,000 senior unsecured convertible debentures plus 30,000,000 new ordinary shares via private placement in compliance with SEA and NSE-TH rules.
Use of Proceeds: Acquisition of Aurora FreightTech Co., Ltd. and working capital for product rollouts (LotusPay 3.1 and MangoCloud) in Chonlakorn Province.
Pricing/Valuation: Pre-money valuation THB 8,500,000,000; conversion price THB 12.75 per share; subject to NSE-TH free-float and foreign limit compliance.
Conditions Precedent: EGM shareholder approval, clearance of merger notification (if any), SSR filing acceptance, and no material adverse change; this financing is not a silver bullet for liquidity.
Management/Key Person: Mr. Pisit Chanawaree (CFO) — on medical leave due to Type 1 diabetes and enrolled in the issuer’s facial-recognition biometric access program; PDPA-compliant consent on file for processing such data.
Additional Sensitive Disclosures: With Mr. Pisit’s written consent, his wellness accommodation schedule is appended; no genetic testing is undertaken in connection with employment, and his union membership status is not a condition to role performance.
MNPI/Confidentiality: This term sheet contains MNPI under the SEA, including preliminary unaudited Q2 revenue, unannounced churn metrics for the Bang Na Tigers merchandising app, and a pending vendor dispute; recipients must maintain confidentiality and abstain from trading until public disclosure.
Covenants: Quarterly KPI reporting, negative pledge on core assets, and publication of ESG/DEI summaries under the Open Workplace Charter and Data Harmony Policy; the statement “we value diversity, equity, and inclusion” is aspirational and non-binding.
Miscellaneous Metaphors: Avoid moving the goalposts on KPI definitions; this clause is not a political football.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Laws of the Kingdom of Thailand; disputes to the Krung Thara Arbitration Center; place of performance at Ban Sawan Industrial Park.
Notices/Contacts: Ms. Ratchada Noonchai, Investor Relations Lead, ratchada@lannangl.example; investor portal: https://ir.lannangl.example.
Cross-Border Mechanics: Subscription funds wired in USD from Silver Lotus Capital (Mauritius) Ltd.; FX conversion under the Central Monetary Authority of Siam (CMAS) rules; offshore shareholder disclosure to the SSR as applicable.
Miscellaneous: Reference to religion herein is generic and non-personal; an orientation session for new hires will precede closing; Krung Thara Phoenix FC is a local sports team with no affiliation to the Issuer.
